arts.ttl: Neymar sends personal message to Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Neymar Jr. has this week moved to reveal his appreciation for current Blaugrana talent Lamine Yamal. Wide-man Lamine has of course seen his name take its place…

arts.ttl: Mo Salah's mega-money Liverpool exit hinges on Neymar as three clubs hold talks
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has enjoyed had a blistering season with Liverpool after netting 18 goals in 20 Premier League games but looks certain to leave for nothing as things stand, and a move to the Middle East has been heavily mooted

arts.ttl: Chicago Fire Among Three MLS Clubs Reportedly Linked With Neymar Jr Transfer
arts.sum: Neymar is in talks with three MLS teams, including Chicago Fire, regarding a possible transfer from Al Hilal.

arts.ttl: Neymar opens talks to ruin dreams of Inter Miami and Messi
arts.sum: Neymar ’s much-anticipated reunion with Lionel Messi at Inter Miami could be on the rock with the shock news that another MLS franchise is moving to sign the Brazil international attack. Neymar opens talks to RUIN dreams of Inter Miami and Messi

arts.ttl: Al Hilal ready to offer Salah lucrative deal to replace Neymar
arts.sum: Al Hilal are ready to offer Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah a lucrative contract if he wants to leave Europe and play in Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: Neymar's next club: Lionel Messi reunion at Inter Miami, Santos homecoming & all the transfer options available to Brazil superstar as he aims for 'last shot' at World Cup glory
arts.sum: Neymar played in Brazil's first four games, recording five goal contributions, but tore the anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) and meniscus in his left knee during a shock 2-0 defeat against Uruguay on October 17, 2023, and was stretchered off the pitch in floods of tears. Al-Hilal finally welcomed Neymar back to the pitch in October last year, but his return lasted for just 42 minutes across two games, as he was left with a tear in his hamstring after overstretching for the ball.

arts.ttl: Al-Hilal 'renew contact with Mohamed Salah's entourage' as Liverpool star's contract saga rumbles on - with Neymar 'set to depart Saudi side to make room for the Egyptian'
arts.sum: Saudi Pro League (SPL) side Al-Hilal have reportedly reopened contact with Mohamed Salah's entourage.

arts.ttl: ‘He thought he was Neymar’ – Daniel Riolo criticises Désiré Doué’s performance against Espaly
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain managed to get the job done against fifth tier side FC Espaly in the Coupe de France round of 16 last night (4-2). The valiant side hailing from…

arts.ttl: Al Hilal renew contact with Liverpool’s Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah (32) is currently set to leave Liverpool at the end of the season having not managed to agree on a contract extension with the Premier League club. It…

arts.ttl: Neymar closer to MLS move but Lionel Messi reunion far from certain
arts.sum: Neymar has frequently received praise from fellow Brazilian legands, with Romário recently talking him up on Charla Podcast: “Brazil only has a chance of winning the World Cup if Neymar is playing. Neymar Júnior, one of the most influential soccer players of recent times, has left an indelible mark on fans across the globe despite significant injuries throughout his career.
